mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, phone, address, consignee, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status) values (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus},#{amount}, #{remark}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{consignee}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus},#{packAmount}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus})
mapper.update:
update orders
cancel_reason=#{cancelReason},
rejection_reason=#{rejectionReason},
cancel_time=#{cancelTime},
pay_status=#{payStatus},
pay_method=#{payMethod},
checkout_time=#{checkoutTime},
status = #{status},
delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.number, o.status, o.user_id AS userId, o.address_book_id AS addressBookId, o.order_time AS orderTime, o.checkout_time AS checkoutTime, o.pay_method AS payMethod, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.amount, o.remark, o.user_name AS userName, o.phone, o.address, o.consignee, o.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, o.rejection_reason AS rejectionReason, o.cancel_time AS cancelTime, o.estimated_delivery_time AS estimatedDeliveryTime, o.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus, o.delivery_time AS deliveryTime, o.pack_amount AS packAmount, o.tableware_number AS tablewareNumber, o.tableware_status AS tablewareStatus FROM orders o WHERE ( (o.status = 2 AND o.checkout_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.checkout_time, NOW()) > #{unconfirmedMinutes}) OR (o.status = 3 AND o.order_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.order_time, NOW()) > #{confirmedMinutes}) OR (o.status = 4 AND o.estimated_delivery_time IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_delivery_time < NOW()) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN o.status = 2 AND o.checkout_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.checkout_time, NOW()) > #{unconfirmedMinutes} THEN 1 WHEN o.status = 4 AND o.estimated_delivery_time IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_delivery_time < NOW() THEN 2 WHEN o.status = 3 AND o.order_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.order_time, NOW()) > #{confirmedMinutes} THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, o.order_time DESC
